rumor.detail: Back in training daily. Rob Page: 'Build fitness gradually—see him in next couple weeks'

newIntel.reasoning: Post-March 4 date gate. Latest prior rumor is Mar 4, 2026. This Mar 9 update shows concrete fitness progression and imminent debut window—genuine new development beyond 'expected to feature.'

rumor.detail: Trial invite sent Feb 8. Expected to sign after trial. Villarreal & Monaco also interested.

newIntel.reasoning: Date gate: prior latest is Feb 12, 2026. Feb 8 date is EARLIER but was discovered in this sweep and not in existing rumors—this specific trial invite detail differs from generic 'invited' language. Randers explicitly confirmed as trial pathway with expected signing terms.

needsReview.detail: Found Souleymane Faye (b.2003) joined Sporting CP Jan 21, 2026 for €6.5m. Database lists Souleymane Faye (b.2010, Sahel F.C).
needsReview.reason: Birth year mismatch. Existing player (b.2010) appears to be youth academy prospect; found transfer refers to different professional player (b.2003). No intel on youth version.
